decks.notes: The main focus of this Weenie White Aggro deck is to flood the board with low-cost creatures like Haliya, Momo, and Sage of the Skies, supported by cards like Starfield Shepherd and Nurturing Pixie. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures and quickly close out the game. Other cards like Get Lost and Seam Rip provide disruption and removal options, while cards like Cosmogrand Zenith and Voice of Victory offer additional support for the aggressive strategy. Overall, the deck prioritizes aggression, speed, and board presence to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing graveyard recursion and powerful combos to overwhelm opponents. By discarding key cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man, players can quickly reanimate impactful creatures such as Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery. Support spells like Requiting Hex and Bitter Triumph help control the board while setting up for devastating plays. Stock Up and Insatiable Avarice provide additional card advantage to keep the engine running smoothly. With a mix of disruption and aggression, this deck aims to outpace opponents and secure victory through overwhelming force.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of creatures and spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It utilizes cheap creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and keep pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and additional creature buffs to maintain momentum. The mana base is designed to support the quick casting of spells and creatures, allowing for a fast-paced and proactive playstyle.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield using various spells and abilities. It combines the Combo strategy of assembling specific card combinations with the Reanimator strategy of cheating creatures into play from the graveyard. The key is to set up the graveyard efficiently and then use cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex to bring back big threats like Ashling, Rekindled and Superior Spider-Man for a strong board presence. The deck also includes disruption and mana-fixing cards to support the main strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing powerful creatures like Dream Beavers and Floodpits Drowner, along with control elements like Requiting Hex and Spell Snare, the player aims to apply consistent pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Dark Leo & Shredder and The Last Ronin's Technique add additional layers of aggression and versatility to the strategy, allowing the player to adapt to different matchups and counter opposing threats effectively. The deck's mana base and card selection are optimized for quick and efficient plays, ensuring a fast and relentless assault on the opponent.

This deck focuses on countering and controlling the opponent's moves while slowly building up its own board presence. It includes cards that can delay the opponent's strategy, such as Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock, while also providing removal options like Burst Lightning and Abrade. The deck also includes card draw and filtering options, like Opt and Sleight of Hand, to ensure consistency in drawing key cards. The goal is to control the game and outmaneuver the opponent until a win condition, such as Hearth Elemental, can be easily achieved.

This deck focuses on building a strong board presence quickly with low-cost creatures and mana ramp spells, leveraging the power of Aggro gameplay to overwhelm opponents. The deck features efficient threats like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, supported by cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension for additional boosts. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing and card advantage, while cards like Archdruid's Charm and Mossborn Hydra offer additional versatility and finishing power. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and maintain a relentless assault on the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to flood the board with low-cost white creatures and generate a powerful board presence quickly. By utilizing cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Momo, Friendly Flier, along with support from Sage of the Skies and Starfield Shepherd, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. The deck also includes removal options like Get Lost and Seam Rip to control the board and allow the aggressive strategy to flourish. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells, this deck aims to win fast and decisively.

The deck focuses on using a combination of flying creatures and card advantage to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive threats and disruptive spells. By establishing a fast board presence with efficient creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, along with using control elements like Get Lost and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to maintain pressure while also disrupting the opponent's strategy. The mana base provides flexibility and consistency, allowing for smooth gameplay and adaptation to various matchups.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing aggressive creatures and spells from the Dimir colors (blue and black) to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage efficiently. With a mix of powerful creatures like Deep-Cavern Bat and Floodpits Drowner, along with disruptive spells like Phantom Interference and Shoot the Sheriff, the deck aims to maintain board presence and control while steadily chipping away at the opponent's life total. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Tishana's Tidebinder and Requiting Hex provide added versatility and options for dealing with different matchups.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and casting low-cost spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Boomerang Basics to control the board and deal damage, the player can push for a fast victory. Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off are key creatures that can deal damage while being difficult for the opponent to block or remove. With a mix of direct damage spells and evasive creatures, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and end the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence and aggressively attacking the opponent with evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck also includes spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal direct damage to the opponent or clear the way for attacks. The deck aims to maintain tempo by using cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to draw into the necessary resources while also utilizing cards like Secret Identity to protect key creatures. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient offense.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. By using cards such as Eddymurk Crab, Sunderflock, and Burst Lightning, the deck can deal with threats while using Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories to dig for key cards. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up resources and ultimately outvalue them in the late game. Utilizing the Izzet color combination of blue and red, this deck aims to outplay opponents through careful decision-making and strategic play.

The deck focuses on using various creatures and spells to ramp up mana quickly and efficiently in order to play Omniscience. Once Omniscience is in play, the deck can cast multiple powerful spells for free, such as Roiling Dragonstorm and Uthros, Titanic Godcore. The deck also includes cards like Consult the Star Charts and Get Lost to control the opponent's board while setting up the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big spells and creatures before they have a chance to respond effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and spells to apply pressure on the opponent quickly. Cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off help to maintain board presence while spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics provide efficient removal. The deck also includes some utility cards like Secret Identity and Into the Flood Maw to disrupt the opponent's plans. The mana base is optimized for consistency and flexibility, allowing the deck to adapt to various board states. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and spell efficiency.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with low-cost, aggressive white creatures while utilizing card draw and removal spells to maintain board control. The synergy between the creatures and support cards allows for a fast and efficient playstyle, putting pressure on the opponent early in the game. By utilizing a combination of flying creatures, creature buffs, and disruptive spells, this deck aims to create a tempo advantage and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game.
